name: Vice Principals
overview: After North Jackson High's long-time principal steps down to tend to his ailing wife, Neal Gamby and Lee Russell, the school's vice principals, are forced to put their mutual disdain aside and form an unholy alliance in order to sabotage the newly appointed principal, Dr. Belinda Brown.

trailers.title: David Gordon Green Showed VICE PRINCIPALS to His Kids | TIFF 2024
